name: token-usage-dashboard
description: Monitor Claude Code token usage with smart recommendations

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/backend && npm run test -w packages/frontend
scripts.test:watch: concurrently "npm run test:watch -w packages/backend" "npm run test:watch -w packages/frontend"
